positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a lone crescent moon and a stylized constellation of abstract geometric stars. The design features strong, clean black line work against a solid cream background. Incorporate celestial elements like flowing cosmic dust trails and abstract planets rendered as simple circles and perfect arcs. The style should be elegant, modern, and slightly retro-futuristic, reminiscent of mid-century atomic art. Focus on symmetrical balance and negative space. High contrast, flat vector rendering, perfect symmetry, printable graphic design, suitable for screen printing on apparel.
